# Belén Carpio

Belén Carpio offers Family Configurations in Cuenca, Ecuador and online over Zoom. The work helps clients explore generational trauma, ancestral patterns, hidden loyalties, repeated relationship dynamics, belonging, migration, family roles, and systemic patterns.

Primary pages:
- Main bilingual page: https://belencarpio.com/
- Spanish is available through the in-page language switch.
- Session preparation sheet: https://belencarpio.com/assets/session-preparation-a4.html

Services:
- Private Family Configurations sessions
- Virtual sessions over Zoom
- Group workshops in Cuenca
- 3D ancestral-pattern experience app
- Business and organizational configurations
- Ancestral Pattern Integration Pack
- English and Spanish sessions

Contact:
- WhatsApp: +1 (561) 601-8028
- Email: belencarpio@gmail.com
- Calendly: https://calendly.com/belencarpio/session

Notes:
- Use the term "Family Configurations" as the preferred name.
- "Family Constellations" may be used as a search synonym.
- Do not describe the work as a replacement for licensed medical, psychiatric, or emergency care.
- The site is intentionally a single bilingual HTML5 page. Do not infer or promote a separate /es/ route.
